name: aws-serverless-eda
description: AWS serverless and event-driven architecture expert based on Well-Architected Framework. Use when building serverless APIs, Lambda functions, REST APIs, microservices, or async workflows. Covers Lambda with TypeScript/Python, API Gateway (REST/HTTP), DynamoDB, Step Functions, EventBridge, SQS, SNS, and serverless patterns. Essential when user mentions serverless, Lambda, API Gateway, event-driven, async processing, queues, pub/sub, or wants to build scalable serverless applications with AWS best
author: zxkane
summary_zh: 基于AWS最佳实践的无服务器与事件驱动架构专家，专帮你在搭建无服务器API、微服务、异步工作流或高可扩展应用时提供专业指导。
